notes: Core subject of study; e-procurement software for indirect goods; Ariba and Commerce One were pioneer vendors; now SAP Ariba dominates
Online catalogs for non-production goods purchasing; Commerce One launched 5M-product catalog by 1998
Built-in procurement in R/3 and Oracle ERP; Aberdeen noted these lacked depth vs. specialist tools; eventually enhanced via partnerships
HTTP/browser as procurement UI; enabling browser-based purchase requisition workflow vs. legacy EDI
Traditional procurement interchange standard; Aberdeen positioned Internet procurement as successor/supplement to EDI
Automated purchase approval routing; key feature of Ariba and Commerce One platforms
